steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what changed when Don Jerónimo became a patron. The passage states directly that he ‘ceased to write plays and assumed instead the nobler rôle of patron.’

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: introduces information not stated in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B: matches the passage exactly — he stopped writing plays. ✓
  • Choice C: contradicts or goes beyond what the passage says. ✗
  • Choice D: introduces information not mentioned in the passage. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
